title: Best 5 Skills Mapping Tools 2026: Degreed vs Eightfold vs LinkedIn Skills Graph Guide
description: 5 Skills Mapping comparison for 2026: Top platforms, pricing, features & ROI. Cut costs 20-30%, boost efficiency 25-40% for business. Ideal for modern operations.
content:
Employee Skills Mapping Digital Transformation Background

In 2026, enterprise employee skills management faces dual challenges of scattered skill data and difficult skill matching. Traditional enterprise employee skills management relies on paper skill files, manual skill assessment, subjective skill matching, with low skill management efficiency, scattered skill data, and subjective skill matching. Employee skills mapping tools through online skill identification, skill visualization, and skill matching help enterprises improve employee skill management efficiency by 60%, visualize skill data, and precise skill matching. Degreed, Eightfold, and LinkedIn Skills Graph as three mainstream employee skills mapping tools each have differentiated positioning: Degreed focuses on enterprise skill learning platform, Eightfold positions itself as AI skills mapping platform, and LinkedIn Skills Graph provides LinkedIn skill data. Enterprise talent managers need to comprehensively evaluate and select based on enterprise scale, skill management requirements, and budget constraints to maximize employee skills mapping ROI.

Three Employee Skills Mapping Tools Function Comparison Table

Function DimensionDegreedEightfoldLinkedIn Skills GraphApplicable Enterprise Scale
Skill IdentificationSkill Learning IdentificationAI Skill IdentificationLinkedIn Skill DataSkill Identification Accuracy
Skill VisualizationSkill Graph VisualizationAI Skill Graph GenerationLinkedIn Skill GraphVisualization Strength
Skill MatchingPosition Skill MatchingAI Skill MatchingLinkedIn Skill MatchingMatching Precision
Pricing ModelEnterprise SubscriptionEnterprise SubscriptionLinkedIn Enterprise VersionBudget Sensitivity
Data AnalysisSkill Data DashboardAI Skill AnalysisLinkedIn Skill AnalysisData Visualization
Learning PathSkill Learning PathAI Learning RecommendationLinkedIn Learning IntegrationLearning Support
System IntegrationHRIS System IntegrationEnterprise System IntegrationLinkedIn Data IntegrationIT Compatibility
Mobile SupportNative App SmoothMobile Web DesignLinkedIn App IntegrationManage Anytime Anywhere

Degreed Detailed Analysis

  • Core Capabilities: Enterprise skill learning platform, skill identification supports skill learning identification (learner learning course skill identification, skill certification identification), enterprise skill identification automation. Skill graph visualization, enterprise talent managers visualize employee skill distribution, skill gap, skill certification progress. Position skill matching, enterprise talent managers match employee skills with position skill requirements, skill matching precision medium. Enterprise subscription pricing, enterprise annual subscription $50000 access skill mapping function, budget investment high. Skill data dashboard, enterprise talent managers visualize skill data, skill learning progress, skill certification data. Skill learning path, enterprise talent managers recommend skill learning path for employees, learning course recommendation. HRIS system integration, Degreed with HRIS platform (like Workday, BambooHR) data sync, skill data and HR data unified management. Native App smooth mobile management, enterprise talent managers iOS/Android App manage skills anytime anywhere.
  • Advantages: Skill learning identification automation, enterprise skill identification efficiency high. Skill graph visualization strong, enterprise talent managers skill management intuitive. Position skill matching precision medium, enterprise skill matching efficiency improved. Skill data dashboard visualization strong, enterprise talent managers skill decision support strong. Skill learning path recommendation efficiency high, employee skill learning efficiency improved. HRIS system integration, skill data and HR data unified management. Native App smooth mobile management, enterprise talent managers mobile management convenient.
  • Disadvantages: Enterprise subscription pricing $50000/year, budget-sensitive enterprise barrier high. Deployment cycle long 2-4 weeks, enterprise configuration skill mapping function time-consuming. Data analysis basic, lacking AI skill predictive analysis (like skill risk prediction, skill optimization suggestion), enterprise talent manager decision support limited. Skill matching precision medium, AI skill matching precision lower than Eightfold. System integration basic, partial HRIS platform integration difficult, enterprise data unified management limited.
  • Price Reference: Degreed subscription $50000/year (500-employee enterprise), advanced skill analysis module $15000/year extra. HRIS system integration free included.

Eightfold Detailed Analysis

  • Core Capabilities: AI skills mapping platform, skill identification supports AI skill identification (employee skill auto identification, skill gap auto identification), enterprise skill identification AI automation precision high. AI skill graph generation, enterprise talent managers AI auto generate employee skill graph, skill distribution visualization. AI skill matching, enterprise talent managers AI auto match employee skills with position skill requirements, skill matching precision high. Enterprise subscription pricing, enterprise annual subscription $80000 access AI skill mapping function, budget investment high. AI skill analysis, enterprise talent managers AI analyze skill data, skill risk prediction, skill optimization suggestion. AI learning recommendation, enterprise talent managers AI recommend skill learning path for employees, learning course recommendation. Enterprise system integration, Eightfold with enterprise HRIS, LMS, CRM data sync, skill data and enterprise data unified management. Mobile web design, enterprise talent managers mobile browser access skill mapping management basic.
  • Advantages: AI skill identification precision high, enterprise skill identification efficiency high precise. AI skill graph generation automation, enterprise talent managers skill management automation efficiency high. AI skill matching precision high, enterprise skill matching efficiency improved precise. AI skill analysis depth strong, enterprise talent managers skill decision support strong. AI learning recommendation precision high, employee skill learning efficiency improved precise. Enterprise system integration strong, skill data and enterprise data unified management strong.
  • Disadvantages: Enterprise subscription pricing $80000/year, budget-sensitive enterprise barrier high. Deployment cycle long 4-6 weeks, enterprise configuration AI skill mapping function time-consuming. Data analysis AI complex, enterprise talent managers learning AI analysis tool time-consuming. System integration configuration complex, enterprise configuration system integration function time-consuming. Mobile web design experience limited, no native App, enterprise talent managers mobile management experience limited.
  • Price Reference: Eightfold subscription $80000/year (500-employee enterprise), advanced AI analysis module $25000/year extra. Enterprise system integration free included.

LinkedIn Skills Graph Detailed Analysis

  • Core Capabilities: LinkedIn skill data platform, skill identification supports LinkedIn skill data (employee LinkedIn skill tag identification, skill certification identification), enterprise skill identification LinkedIn datadigitization. LinkedIn skill graph, enterprise talent managers visualize employee LinkedIn skill distribution, skill gap. LinkedIn skill matching, enterprise talent managers match employee LinkedIn skills with position skill requirements, skill matching precision medium. LinkedIn enterprise version pricing, enterprise annual subscription $10000 access LinkedIn skill mapping function, budget friendly. LinkedIn skill analysis, enterprise talent managers analyze LinkedIn skill data, skill distribution data. LinkedIn Learning integration, enterprise talent managers recommend LinkedIn Learning courses for employees, learning path. LinkedIn data integration, LinkedIn Skills Graph with LinkedIn Profile data sync, skill data and LinkedIn data unified management. LinkedIn App integration mobile management, enterprise talent managers LinkedIn App manage skills anytime anywhere.
  • Advantages: LinkedIn skill data real, enterprise skill identification data authenticity strong. LinkedIn skill graph visualization strong, enterprise talent managers skill management intuitive. LinkedIn enterprise version pricing $10000/year budget friendly, enterprise budget controllable. LinkedIn Learning integration, employee skill learning efficiency improved. LinkedIn data integration, skill data and LinkedIn data unified management strong. LinkedIn App integration mobile management, enterprise talent managers mobile management convenient.
  • Disadvantages: Skill identification LinkedIn data dependency, employee LinkedIn skill data update not timely, skill identification data timeliness limited. Data analysis basic, lacking AI skill predictive analysis, enterprise talent manager decision support limited. Skill matching precision medium, AI skill matching precision lower than Eightfold. Enterprise system integration weak, lacking enterprise HRIS, LMS system integration, enterprise data unified management limited. Mobile management LinkedIn App integration basic, lacking independent native App, mobile management experience limited.
  • Price Reference: LinkedIn enterprise version $10000/year (500-employee enterprise), LinkedIn Learning integration free included. LinkedIn data integration free included.

Enterprise Talent Manager Selection Decision Matrix

Skill ScenarioRecommended ToolKey Consideration FactorsBudget ReferenceDeployment Cycle
Skill Learning IdentificationDegreedSkill Learning Path Recommendation$50000/Year2 Weeks
AI Skill Mapping PreciseEightfoldAI Skill Matching Precision High$80000/Year4 Weeks
LinkedIn Skill DataLinkedIn Skills GraphLinkedIn Skill Data Real$10000/YearInstant
Budget-Sensitive EnterpriseLinkedIn Skills GraphLinkedIn Enterprise Version Low Price$10000/YearInstant
AI Skill Analysis DepthEightfoldAI Skill Predictive Analysis$105000/Year6 Weeks
Mobile Management ConvenientDegreedNative App Smooth$50000/Year2 Weeks

Employee Skills Mapping Tool 2026 Trend Prediction

In 2026, employee skills mapping tools present five development trends: AI Skill Identification precision improvement, tools AI auto identify employee skills, skill gap, skill identification precision improves to 95%. Employee skill Real-time Graph visualization, tools real-time visualize employee skill distribution, skill gap, skill certification progress, skill management real-timedigitization. AI Skill Matching precision strengthening, tools AI auto match employee skills with position skill requirements, skill matching precision improves to 90%. Skill graph deep integration with HRIS, tools deep integration with HRIS platform, skill data and HR data seamless sync unified management. Mobile Native App smooth managementbecoming widespread, all tools provide iOS/Android native App, enterprise talent manager mobile skill management experience strong. Enterprises should prioritize skill mapping tools supporting AI skill identification, real-time graph visualization, AI skill matching to lay foundation for 2026-2028 employee skill management digital transformation.

HouseCar Lifestyle: Digital Nomad Freedom

Time saved = life earned. Automate—work from RV, cabin, beach. Stop tethering to offices. Let AI handle work while you chase sunsets. HouseCar: Automate, liberate, live free.
author: Enterprise Talent Management Consultant

schema.name: Employee Skills Mapping Tool Review: Degreed vs Eightfold vs LinkedIn Skills Graph 2026 Enterprise Skills Visualization Solution

mainEntity.name: What features does Best 5 Skills Mapping offer?

acceptedAnswer.text: Best 5 Skills Mapping include learning management, course creation tools, student tracking, automated grading, content libraries, video hosting, discussion forums, certificate generation, and analytics dashboards. Advanced features include adaptive learning and AI tutoring.

Educational platforms typically charge per student or course. Basic plans start at $5-20 per student monthly, institutional licenses range $500-5000 monthly, and enterprise solutions cost $5000-20000+ annually. Free tiers often exist for small classes.

mainEntity.name: How do these tools support remote learning?

acceptedAnswer.text: Platforms provide video conferencing, asynchronous learning modules, mobile apps, offline access, virtual classrooms, interactive whiteboards, breakout rooms, peer collaboration tools, and cloud-based content delivery.

mainEntity.name: What analytics and tracking features are available?

acceptedAnswer.text: Tools offer engagement metrics, completion rates, time-tracking, assessment scores, learning path progress, competency mapping, dropout predictions, attendance tracking, and detailed performance reports for students and courses.

mainEntity.name: How do educators create and manage content?

acceptedAnswer.text: Features include drag-drop course builders, multimedia embedding, quiz creators, assignment templates, rubric systems, content banks, version control, collaborative editing, and automatic backup of educational materials.

Platforms integrate with student information systems, video tools (Zoom/Teams), calendars, payment gateways, authentication systems, plagiarism checkers, e-textbooks, and third-party educational content providers.

howto_schema.name: How to Choose and Implement Best 5 Skills Mapping
howto_schema.description: Step-by-step guide for selecting and deploying Best 5 Skills Mapping

step.name: Define Learning Objectives
step.text: Identify course goals, target audience, learning outcomes, assessment criteria, content formats needed, and engagement requirements. Map objectives to platform capabilities.

step.name: Evaluate Platform Features
step.text: Compare Best 5 Skills Mapping options for content creation, student management, assessment tools, analytics, integrations, mobile access, and scalability. Request demos from education-focused vendors.

step.name: Configure Learning Environment
step.text: Set up course structure, upload content, configure assessments, establish enrollment rules, create discussion areas, set up grading systems, and integrate external resources.

step.name: Develop and Test Content
step.text: Create engaging learning materials using platform tools. Test all content for functionality, accessibility, mobile compatibility, and student experience. Pilot with small group for feedback.

step.name: Launch and Monitor Progress
step.text: Enroll students, provide orientation, track engagement through analytics, address technical issues promptly, collect feedback, and continuously improve based on learning data.
